But most people have a budget for their finances, but we don't even really think about how we budget or steward our time and how important it is. Invest in others. Would you ask God to give you somebody this year to invest in, to be able to disciple, to be able to invest in them spiritually? See, the Bible says to whom much is given, much is required. There's some folks that have been taught a lot. There's some folks that have had, been on the receiving end of somebody spiritually investing in you. God, would you give me somebody? Would you help me to be intentional? Would you help me to be purposed? I want to invest in someone else spiritually. Could I encourage you to develop some spiritual goals? It's not gonna happen by chance. You gotta have some goals. Many times people, this time when I was in the corporate world, we had to have these professional goals. We had to write all these things out and send all these things up to our superiors of what our professional goals were for the next year and how we were gonna develop ourselves in this area or that area and what we're gonna do. And some of you might have gone through similar types of things. Some of you may be doing that kind of thing even now. I'm gonna develop professionally. Well, I'm asking you tonight, how are you gonna develop spiritually? Are we going to develop some spiritual goals? Get some time in God's Word, maybe find a book that would help you, that would enable you to grow, be a good resource for you, and then put on your armor. Don't become a casualty. We're living, we're living in the last days. I truly believe that. I've said to a few people recently, they've come and said some things to me about, did you see this, and you said it's so bad. Yeah, it's true. Evil men and seducers shall wax worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived. I understand. I'm not trying to take an easy way out. I'm just simply saying we live in a hostile environment. We live in a hostile environment. If you lived in certain parts of the United States of America, you would do certain things to protect yourself. Right? If you lived in Chicago, listen, if I went to Chicago tonight, I would not walk down the road just like this. I just wouldn't. I've read enough stuff in the news to know that it's not a good idea. Spiritually, we have an enemy. He wants to devour you. He wants to destroy you. And so we've got to put on the whole armor of God. And what a blessing that God gives us that instruction and that admonition this evening, In 2026, you're not going to get to the end of it and it be successful unless you purpose. You put some things in action. How can I bring honor and glory to God in this next calendar year? Let's pray together. Father, we love you. Thank you so much for loving us. Thank you for your word. Thank you for many portions of scripture that we look to this evening, thinking about these thoughts and tips. And no doubt, it's not an exhaustive list. There's other things that we could add to it. Lord, ultimately, our desire, my desire is that we would glorify thee. To summarize it as John the Baptist said, I must decrease. You must increase. Lord, help us to live our lives in such a way that you would be honored and glorified. Work in hearts and lives. Maybe there's some things that some folks need to incorporate in their lives, some decisions that they need to make this evening as they evaluate the previous year and look forward to a new year. Not being presumptuous, but simply planning, trying to be good stewards. Or would you help us to be responsive? Help us to be obedient. Well, thank you for every decision. For it's in Christ's name we pray. Would you stand with me?
